pageContext.name: Blue & Beta D-Stage
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Beast Kingdom present the Blue & Beta D-Stage Statue.  The D-Stage, staging your dream collection from Beast Kingdom is ready to roar it's way onto a desk near you with the release of the Jurassic World collection of dioramas!  Fusing the old and the new in this last movie from the Jurassic World trilogy, beloved velociraptor Blue now has a baby named Beta!  Standing on a snowy mound, the lush forest landscape is a perfect setting to find our new and old characters in! Take home a little bit of the movie magic, in full three dimensional form with the D-Stage collection!
